---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve AIAAR
title: '[BUG] '
labels: ['bug']
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Summary
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots/Logs
If applicable, add screenshots, Make.com execution logs, or error messages to help explain your problem.

```
Paste any relevant logs, error messages, or Make.com execution details here
```

## Environment Information
**Make.com Scenario Details:**
- Scenario Name: [e.g., Auction Discovery, Item Analysis]
- Scenario ID: [if available]
- Last Working Version: [if known]
- Execution Frequency: [e.g., every 15 minutes]

**API Information:**
- eBay API: [Sandbox/Production]
- OpenAI Model: [e.g., gpt-4, gpt-3.5-turbo]
- Airtable Base: [Base name/ID if relevant]
- PayPal Environment: [Sandbox/Live]

**System Information:**
- Browser: [if web-related, e.g., Chrome 91.0.4472.124]
- Make.com Plan: [e.g., Core, Pro, Teams]
- Date/Time of Issue: [when the issue occurred]

## Additional Context
- Is this a recurring issue or one-time occurrence?
- Were there any recent changes to scenarios or configuration?
- Any related issues or error patterns?
- Impact level: [Low/Medium/High/Critical]

## Possible Solution
If you have any ideas about what might be causing the issue or how to fix it, please share them here.
